description_long: This is a cylindrical orange cup with a smooth, glossy finish and a robust, squared handle attached to one side. The cup features large, bold white text wrapping around its exterior, partially visible from different angles, suggesting a playful or promotional message. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping and is seamlessly integrated into the cup's body. The rim is thick and rounded, providing comfort for drinking. The interior is the same orange color as the exterior, and the cup appears to be made of a durable plastic material. There are no visible decorative patterns aside from the text, and the cup does not have a lid.
description: A glossy orange cup with a squared handle and bold white text wrapping around its exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle centered and the cup's smooth, orange surface with no visible text.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the handle on the left and the start of the white text 'GET' on the cup's side.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle not visible, showing the middle portion of the white text 'T MUGG'.
description_view_3: Angled view with the handle on the right and the end of the white text 'GGED' visible.
